title: plectranthus assurgens
intro: Plectranthus assurgens, also known as Mountain Scented Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Plectranthus assurgens include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
